title: conyza gouanii
intro: Conyza gouanii, also known as Canina or Wild Cress, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Conyza gouanii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory problems. Conyza gouanii can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or tea to harness its medicinal properties, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine.
